rationale.R1.5: The output restructures the paper in a more logical flow, improving readability and clarity.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent claims to have improved the text, it doesn't explicitly quantify its confidence in each change or highlight any areas of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft stays within the scope of the original paper, addressing all the key points and arguments.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced. The edits appear to be constructive and beneficial.
rationale.RX.5: Some changes are explained, but not all.  More detailed annotations on the source and reasoning behind each modification would improve traceability.
